nasb.text: but from the tree of the knowledge of good and evil you shall not eat, for in the day that you eat from it you will surely die.”

esv.text: but of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil you shall not eat, for in the day that you eat of it you shall surely die.”

cnv.text: 只是那知善惡樹的果子，你不可吃；因為你吃的時候，你必要死。”

ccb.text: 只是不可吃那棵分别善恶树的果子，因为你若吃了，当天必死。”

csbs.text: 只是分辨善恶树上的果实，你不可吃，因为在吃的日子，你必定死。”
